title: Korean brands sweep beauty bestseller lists on Japan's Qoo10
author: Korea Herald
snippet: Aprilskin's Hero All Day Plumping Tint, Fwee's Spring Makeup Set and Peripera's Mood Glowy Tint lead the lip makeup category. Korean brands swept the top five spots in lip makeup.

title: リップティントのおすすめ人気ランキング200選 | LIPS
author: LIPS Cosme
snippet: Top 10 lip tint ranking: Canmake むちぷるティント ¥770, Laka フルーティーグラムティント ¥1,980 (7,149 reviews, 4.30 score), rom&nd ¥1,320

title: Regulatory Status D&C Red 33 | FDA
author: FDA
snippet: D&C Red 33 approved for lip products at max 3% by weight. Cannot be used in eye area. Batch certification required.

title: 飲み会リップ特集 | @cosme
author: @cosme editorial
snippet: 14 products evaluated for 飲み会リップ criteria: cup stain resistance, wearability during eating/drinking, color vibrancy

title: Sephora and Olive Young bring K-beauty to global audiences
author: Personal Care Insights
snippet: Partnership announced Jan 20, 2026. Rollout begins Fall 2026 at ~700 Sephora locations. Initial markets: Singapore, Malaysia, Hong Kong, Thailand.

title: SEPHORA and OLIVE YOUNG Partner | Sephora Newsroom
author: Sephora
snippet: Omnichannel partnership in US, Canada, Hong Kong, Southeast Asia. Broader expansion to Middle East, UK, Australia in 2027.

title: TikTok Hot Selling Lip Trends 2025
author: Accio
snippet: Global lipstick market $9.5B in 2024, projected CAGR 4.9% to $15.2B by 2034. Lip care sector $4.52B in 2024.

title: How K-Beauty Conquered 2025 Through TikTok Shop | Cosmetics & Toiletries
author: Cosmetics & Toiletries
snippet: More than 740,000 new short videos around K-Beauty in one quarter alone, 97% QoQ increase. US K-beauty sales expected to exceed $2B in 2025, up 37%.

title: EU Cosmetic Regulatory Updates for 2025 & 2026 | Cosmeservice
author: Cosmeservice
snippet: Commission Regulation (EU) 2024/858 modified Annexes II and III. EU 2026/78 applies from May 1, 2026 on CMR substances.

title: Korea cosmetics exports hit record USD 10B in 2024 | Korea.net
author: Korea.net
snippet: 2024 exports $10.2B (+20.6% YoY). Japan exports $1.04B. Korea ranked 3rd globally. Japan K-beauty imports up 120.8% in 2024.

title: 올리브영 2025년 립틴트 베스트 7가지 추천
author: 헤리도리
snippet: Price range 10,000-20,000 KRW. 롬앤 13,000원, 에뛰드 12,000원, 페리페라 10,000원, 웨이크메이크 16,000원, 딘토 20,000원

title: 2025 올리브영 어워즈 4개중 3개 인디브랜드
author: 아시아타임즈
snippet: 2025 어워즈 40개 부문 166개 상품. 4개 중 3개가 인디브랜드 차지. 페리페라 잉크 무드 글로이 틴트 4년 연속 수상.

title: TikTok Shop Statistics 2025-2026
author: Resourcera
snippet: TikTok Shop US sales surged 120% YoY. Wonderskin Lip Stain $46M+ GMV. One Wonderskin Lip Stain sold every 5 seconds on TikTok Shop.

title: Skin barrier, GRWM and lip stains dominate TikTok 2025 | Cosmetics Business
author: Cosmetics Business
snippet: Wonderskin Lip Stain searches up 13% March-May 2025. #skinbarrier 356K posts 28% hashtag growth.

title: Sephora taps Olive Young to scale K-beauty | eMarketer
author: eMarketer
snippet: K-beauty sales rose 37.2% YoY to $2B for year ended July 31, 2025.
